## Definition of Done (per docs/implementation-plan.md §10)

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`make test`)
- [ ] Lint, format, typecheck clean (`make ci`)
- [ ] Telemetry/observability considered (traces, metrics, logs)
- [ ] Behind a feature flag if it changes product/model behavior
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CLAUDE.md / source docs in lockstep)
- [ ] No secrets committed; security implications considered
